mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_requests (id, file_id, requester_id, mode, status, open_marker, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{fileId}, #{requesterId}, #{mode}, 'OPEN', #{fileId}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO approval_request_approvers (request_id, approver_id, seq) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{approverId}, #{seq})
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_id AS fileId, requester_id AS requesterId, mode, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM approval_requests WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND status = 'OPEN' LIMIT 1
SELECT id, file_id AS fileId, requester_id AS requesterId, mode, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM approval_requests WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND status = 'OPEN' LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT approver_id AS approverId, seq, decision, decided_at AS decidedAt, comment, acted_by AS actedBy FROM approval_request_approvers WHERE request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY seq ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_requests SET status = #{status}, open_marker = NULL, decided_at = #{decidedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'OPEN'

UPDATE approval_request_approvers a JOIN approval_requests r ON r.id = a.request_id SET a.decision = 'PENDING', a.decided_at = NULL, a.comment = NULL, a.acted_by = NULL WHERE a.request_id = #{requestId} AND a.approver_id = #{approverId} AND a.decision != 'PENDING' AND r.status = 'OPEN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_activity (request_id, actor_id, action, comment, `timestamp`) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{actorId}, #{action}, #{comment}, #{timestamp})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.requester_id AS requesterId, r.mode, r.status, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.decided_at AS decidedAt, COALESCE(SUM(a.decision = 'APPROVED'), 0) AS approvedCount, COALESCE(SUM(a.decision = 'REJECTED'), 0) AS rejectedCount, COUNT(a.id) AS totalApprovers, GROUP_CONCAT(a.approver_id ORDER BY a.seq SEPARATOR ', ') AS approverNames FROM approval_requests r LEFT JOIN approval_request_approvers a ON a.request_id = r.id WHERE r.file_id = #{fileId} GROUP BY r.id, r.requester_id, r.mode, r.status, r.created_at, r.decided_at ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
